eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Blaine, ID; at 5:54 PM on JUL 9, 2026 Effective until 1:54 AM JUL 10, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
The Slaughter House Evacuation Zone (see map) has been put on Level 2 SET STATUS.  This means that you should be set to evacuate at a moments notice. There is high fire danger in your area. MAKE IMMEDIATE PREPARATIONS FOR EVACUATION of family members, belongings and/or animals. Residents are urged to gather important documents, medications, and essential personal effects so that they will be able to immediately leave should conditions deteriorate. Be aware that power and gas may be discontinued to your area during this time.

If a Mandatory Evacuation order is issued in your area, you will be notified. If you are in danger, DO NOT WAIT for an evacuation order. Take the initiative to leave immediately.
